ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_peaks" (
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak signal */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene associated with the peak */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the peak is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the peak on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the peak on the chromosome */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the signal for the peak */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value indicating the confidence level of the peak */,
  "peak_index" INTEGER /* Index of the peak within the dataset */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the peak */,
  "source_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset from which the peak was derived */,
  "peak_type" TEXT /* Type of peak (e.g., enhancer, promoter) */,
  "peak_quality_score" REAL /* Quality or reliability score of the peak */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* User who annotated the peak */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the peak was annotated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_peaks_chromosome FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_peaks_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_peaks_source_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_peaks_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "ensembl_id" TEXT /* Ensembl gene ID */,
  "entrez_id" REAL /* Entrez gene ID */,
  "external_name" TEXT /* External gene name */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, pseudogene) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene */,
  "gene_expression_levels" TEXT /* Expression levels of the gene in different conditions */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Function of the gene */,
  "curated_by" INTEGER /* User who curated the gene information */,
  "curation_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene information was last curated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_curated_by FOREIGN KEY ("curated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version of the genome assembly */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the chromosome belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public database, private study) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the dataset applies */,
  "curated_by" INTEGER /* User who curated the dataset */,
  "curation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last curated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_curated_by FOREIGN KEY ("curated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_peaks" (
  "dataset_peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-peak relation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the peak */,
  "peak_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the peak in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_peaks_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES genomic_peaks ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_peaks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
